# InfinityKit AI Tools Catalog

InfinityKit is a modern, premium, and 100% client-side digital utility workspace offering 112+ distinct productivity, security, developer, and file manipulation tools with zero server-side file retention and strict user privacy.

## Core Platform Attributes
- **Privacy-First**: Zero server-side file storage. PDF splitting, resizing, merging, and image compressions execute locally inside the browser memory.
- **AI Integrations**: Server-side AI text processing backed by Google Gemini, OpenAI, and free live Pollinations fallback.
- **Cloud backups**: Firestore secured bidirectional backup of notes, checklists, and outflow balance ledgers.

---

## Tool Folders & Routes Directory

### 📄 PDF Documents (`/pdf`)
Lightweight, client-side PDF document manipulation tools:
- **Merge PDF files**: `/pdf/mergepdf` (Combine multiple PDF files)
- **Split PDF pages**: `/pdf/splitpdf` (Extract pages from PDF)
- **Reduce PDF size**: `/pdf/compresspdf` (Optimize stream size)
- **Rotate PDF pages**: `/pdf/rotatepdf` (Change orientation)
- **Password Lock PDF**: `/pdf/protectpdf` (Secure PDF with password)
- **Unlock PDF file**: `/pdf/unlockpdf` (Decrypt standard password)
- **Export PDF to Images**: `/pdf/pdftoimage` (Render PDF as PNGs)
- **Convert Images to PDF**: `/pdf/imagetopdf` (Compile images into PDF)
- **Add PDF Watermark**: `/pdf/watermarkpdf` (Inject custom text watermark overlay)
- **AI PDF Summarizer**: `/pdf/ai-summarize-pdf` (Extract highlights from uploaded PDF)
- **AI Chat with PDF**: `/pdf/ai-chat-pdf` (Discuss context with PDF content)

### 🖼️ Photos & Images (`/image`)
In-browser graphical editing and conversion utilities:
- **Remove Background**: `/image/bg-remover` (Strip background overlay)
- **Blur Background**: `/image/blur-background` (Apply Gaussian blur)
- **Shrink Photo file**: `/image/image-compressor` (Lossy canvas size reducer)
- **Resize Dimensions**: `/image/image-resizer` (Crop and adjust coordinates)
- **Read Photo Details**: `/image/imageinfo` (Check EXIF and metadata details)
- **AI Image Generator**: `/image/image-generator` (Descriptive prompt-to-art canvas creator)
- **EXIF Metadata Stripper**: `/image/metadata-stripper` (Wipe camera details from files)
- **Color Palette Extractor**: `/image/color-palette` (Extract dynamic HEX color arrays from photos)

### ✍️ AI Writing Assistant (`/ai-writing`)
Advanced copywriting and editing engines:
- **AI Essay Writer**: `/ai-writing/essay-writer` (Generate academic essays)
- **AI Text Humanizer**: `/ai-writing/ai-humanizer` (Rewrite text avoiding robotic GPT clichés)
- **AI Blog Planner**: `/ai-writing/blog-generator` (Create SEO blog structure)
- **AI Article Planner**: `/ai-writing/article-writer` (Generate conversational news articles)
- **AI FAQ Generator**: `/ai-writing/faq-generator` (Create helpful FAQs list)
- **AI Grammar Checker**: `/ai-writing/grammar-fixer` (Proofread syntax and spelling errors)
- **AI Paragraph Paraphrase**: `/ai-writing/ai-rewriter` (Restructure paragraphs cleanly)
- **AI Chatbot Assistant**: `/ai-writing/chatbot` (Interact with advanced Infinity AI model)
- **AI Smart Text Improver**: `/ai-writing/text-improver` (Elevate document vocabulary)
- **AI Smart Text Summarizer**: `/ai-writing/summarizer` (Distill long essays into outline key highlights)
- **AI Prompts for Men**: `/ai-writing/men-prompts` (Tailored style prompts)
- **AI Prompts for Women**: `/ai-writing/women-prompts` (Tailored style prompts)
- **Refine Prompts Assistant**: `/ai-writing/smartsuggestions` (Optimize prompts for LLMs)

### 💻 Code & Dev Tools (`/developer-tools`)
Structured formatters, converters, and design codegen:
- **Format JSON code**: `/developer-tools/json-code` (Clean and validate JSON)
- **JSON to TypeScript class**: `/developer-tools/json-to-ts` (Infer interfaces from payload)
- **Optimize SVG vector**: `/developer-tools/svg-optimizer` (Optimize SVGO XML paths)
- **Structured SEO Schema Maker**: `/developer-tools/schema-generator` (Build JSON-LD sitemaps)
- **URL Link Encoder**: `/developer-tools/urlencoder` (Encode/Decode url query segments)
- **Extract Links from Text**: `/developer-tools/urlextractor` (RegExp url stripper)
- **Columns Data Summarizer**: `/developer-tools/categorysummary` (Analyze numerical/categorical spreadsheet columns)
- **E-Signatures Pad**: `/developer-tools/e-signature` (Draw and export online e-signatures)
- **Secured Vault Note**: `/developer-tools/encrypted-note` (Password protect sensitive client notes)
- **CSV Spreadsheet Viewer**: `/developer-tools/csvviewer` (Tabular display and edit CSV data)
- **Frosty Glass CSS Maker**: `/developer-tools/glass-gen` (Generate glassmorphism CSS codes)
- **Interactive Graph Maker**: `/developer-tools/graphmaker` (Plot dataset lines and bars on HTML canvas)
- **Average & Mean Calculator**: `/developer-tools/averagecalculator` (Mean, median, and average calculator)
- **Sort Numbers in Order**: `/developer-tools/numbersorter` (Order arrays mathematically)

### 🛠️ Everyday Tools (`/utility`)
Daily productivity calculators, security scanners, and study planners:
- **Body Weight Analyzer (BMI)**: `/utility/bmicalculator` (Health mass index analyzer)
- **Medicine Dose Calculator**: `/utility/drugdosage` (Prescription mg weight estimator)
- **IV Fluid Drip Rate**: `/utility/ivdripcalc` (Saline IV drops/min calculator)
- **Daily Doses Reminder Alarm**: `/utility/medicinereminder` (Pill alarm scheduler)
- **Pomodoro Study Timer**: `/utility/timer` (Focus interval stopwatch)
- **Crypto Password Maker**: `/utility/passwordgen` (Generate highly secure passwords)
- **Scan-to-Open QR Maker**: `/utility/qrcode-gen` (Dynamic QR code generator)
- **Measurement Units Converter**: `/utility/unitconverter` (Length, mass, and volume converter)
- **Percentage Discount Calc**: `/utility/percentagecalc` (Standard percent calculator)
- **Days Counter between Dates**: `/utility/daysbetween` (Calculate duration between dates)
- **Self-Destruct Notes**: `/utility/note-shredder` (Notes that self-destruct once read)
- **Breaches Leak Scanner**: `/utility/password-leak` (Secure SHA-1 HaveIBeenPwned scanner)
- **Key Strength Entropy**: `/utility/passwordstrength` (Calculate cracking entropy bits)
- **Parabola Math Solver**: `/utility/equationsolver` (Solve quadratic vertex roots)
- **Daily To-Do Checklist**: `/utility/todolist` (Task list saved to cloud)
- **Quick Notebook Vault**: `/utility/notes` (Personal notes synchronized to cloud)
- **Outflow Purchases Recorder**: `/utility/expenseadd` (Budget tracker outflow recorder)
- **Savings Limits Planner**: `/utility/budgettracker` (Savings limit planner)
- **Spending Visual Graphs**: `/utility/expenseanalytics` (Visual budgeting graphs)
- **Printable Balance Statements**: `/utility/dailymonthlyreport` (Export statement balance reports)
- **Where Do I Spend Most?**: `/utility/topspendinginsights` (Budget drains analytics)
- **Erase Ledger History**: `/utility/resetexpenses` (Clear all budgets)
- **View Expense Records**: `/utility/expenselist` (View historical purchases list)
- **Search & Filter Expenses**: `/utility/searchexpenses` (Query transactions)
- **Sales Discount Calculator**: `/utility/discountcalc` (Final price discount solver)
- **LCM & HCF Finder**: `/utility/lcmhcf` (Calculate lowest & highest factors)
- **Convert Text Cases**: `/utility/caseconverter` (UPPER, lower, and Title case converter)
- **Word & Character Counter**: `/utility/wordcounter` (Inspect length and density)
- **Generate Fibonacci Range**: `/utility/fibonacci` (Output Fibonacci range)
- **Factorial Calculator**: `/utility/factorial` (Solve mathematical factorials)
- **Prime Number Checker**: `/utility/primenumber` (Validate prime criteria)
- **Palindrome Checker**: `/utility/palindrome` (Check flipped word reading parity)
- **Flip Text Backward**: `/utility/textreverse` (Reverse texts character-by-character)
- **Yes or No Decision Oracle**: `/utility/yesnogerator` (Decision-making oracle)
- **Triangle Validity Inspector**: `/utility/trianglechecker` (Verify geometric angle validities)
- **Remove Duplicate Words**: `/utility/removeduplicates` (Wipe repeating word occurrences)
- **Creative Username Generator**: `/utility/usernamegen` (Create engaging handles)
- **Internet Speed Test**: `/utility/speed-test` (In-browser speed latency checker)
- **Morse Code Converter**: `/utility/morse-flash` (Convert letters to Morse signals)
- **Distance Calc Coordinates**: `/utility/distancecalc` (Euclidean distance calculator)
- **Class Grade Estimator**: `/utility/examcalc` (Estimate exam percentages)
- **Spin-the-Wheel Picker**: `/utility/spinwheel` (Animated selection spinner picker)
- **Compare Choices Matrix**: `/utility/choicecomparator` (Matrix comparison layout tool)
- **Pick Random Winners**: `/utility/randomnamepicker` (Draw a random winner from list)
- **Encrypted Password Keeper**: `/utility/passwordsaver` (Store passwords in local AES vault)
- **Interactive Survey Builder**: `/utility/surveybuilder` (Create active questionnaires)
- **My Surveys Dashboard**: `/utility/mysurveys` (Inspect survey submissions dashboard)
- **Survey Submissions Analyst**: `/utility/responseviewer` (Export analytical responses data)
- **Fill Survey Form**: `/utility/publicsurvey` (Public survey answer submission sheet)

### ⚡ Schedules & Automation (`/automation`)
Time management and batch processing:
- **Batch File Renamer**: `/automation/bulk-renamer` (Batch rename uploaded files)
- **Daily Schedule Planner**: `/automation/dailyplanner` (Arrange and organize schedules)
- **Calendar Event Scheduler**: `/automation/calendarviewer` (Schedule calendar dates)
- **Alarm & Reminder Alerts**: `/automation/reminderalert` (Set alerts with triggers)

### 📱 Social Media & Sharing (`/social`)
P2P sharing and social builders:
- **Direct P2P File Transfer**: `/social/p2p-share` (Direct in-browser P2P WebRTC sharing)
- **Link-In-Bio Page Builder**: `/social/link-bio` (Responsive social landing creator)
